description:
AI-powered next-generation cross-platform multithreaded downloader.

A cross-platform fluent-design AI-boost multi-threaded downloader built with Python.
Important
我们建议通过软件内的 设置 > 浏览器扩展 > 一键安装 的方式来更新最新的浏览器插件 (#390)
Tip
GD4B 浏览器扩展现已上架 Chrome 应用商店，可直接前往 Chrome Web Store 安装
新增功能 🎉
- GD4B 浏览器扩展升级至 2.1.0 By @XiaoYouChR
- GD4B 浏览器扩展新增右键菜单「另存为」选项，并支持自定义跳过接管的文件扩展名列表 By @XiaoYouChR
- GD4B 浏览器扩展在待配对时会自动触发配对流程 By @XiaoYouChR
- 关闭窗口时可选择最小化到托盘或直接退出程序 (#571) By @XiaoYouChR
- 删除任务时默认勾选「同时删除本地文件」(#566) By @XiaoYouChR
- 标题栏新增统一搜索框，支持实时过滤设置项和任务列表，移动端同步支持 (#486) By @XiaoYouChR
- 任务列表新增分段控件，可一键筛选任务状态 By @XiaoYouChR
- 请求头编辑改为直观的 Key-Value 表格 By @XiaoYouChR
- 计划任务支持下载完成后自动睡眠 By @XiaoYouChR
功能优化 🔧
- 设置分组卡片在鼠标悬停时会高亮显示 By @XiaoYouChR
问题修复 🐛
- 修复删除下载中的任务时提示文件仍被占用的问题 (#573) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复切换到任务列表页面时闪烁抖动的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复代理设置在未填写 IP 和端口时无法切换协议的问题 (#574) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 GD4B 浏览器扩展对 Instagram 和抖音视频解析失败的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 GD4B 浏览器扩展拦截下载时发送了重定向后的 CDN 地址而非原始链接的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 GD4B 浏览器扩展下载的文件在客户端中显示为文件不存在的问题 (#572) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 GD4B 浏览器扩展中点击打开文件夹时会同时打开文件的问题 (#568) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 GitHub 加速代理对部分下载链接未生效的问题 (#575) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 yt-dlp 下载任务无法暂停的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
Important
We recommend updating the latest browser extension via Settings > Browser Extension > One-Click Install within the app (#390)
Tip
The GD4B browser extension is now available on the Chrome Web Store
New Features 🎉
- The GD4B browser extension has been upgraded to 2.1.0 By @XiaoYouChR
- The GD4B browser extension adds a "Save As" context menu option, and supports customizing which file extensions to skip interception for By @XiaoYouChR
- The GD4B browser extension now automatically triggers pairing when waiting for connection By @XiaoYouChR
- You can now choose whether the close button minimizes to tray or exits the app (#571) By @XiaoYouChR
- Deleting a task now checks "Also delete local file" by default (#566) By @XiaoYouChR
- The title bar now features a unified search box for real-time filtering of both settings and task list, with mobile support (#486) By @XiaoYouChR
- The task list adds a segmented control for one-click filtering by task status By @XiaoYouChR
- The request headers editor is now a more intuitive Key-Value table By @XiaoYouChR
- Scheduled tasks can now automatically put the computer to sleep after download completes By @XiaoYouChR
Improvements 🔧
- Settings group cards now highlight on mouse hover By @XiaoYouChR
Bug Fixes 🐛
- Fixed files remaining locked when deleting a downloading task (#573) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed flickering when switching to the task list page By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed inability to switch proxy protocol without first filling in IP and port (#574) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed the GD4B browser extension failing to parse Instagram and Douyin videos By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed the GD4B browser extension sending the redirected CDN URL instead of the original link when intercepting downloads By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed downloaded files from the GD4B browser extension showing as "file not found" in the desktop app (#572) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed clicking "Open Folder" in the GD4B browser extension also opening the file (#568) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed the GitHub download accelerator not working for certain download links (#575) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed yt-dlp download tasks being unable to pause By @XiaoYouChR
Full Changelog: v4.0.5...v4.1.0
